message:
fix(wa): Correct MAX_MESSAGE_SIZE constant and improve E2E script robustness

Bug fixes and test improvements:

- Update main.rs test: Correct MAX_MESSAGE_SIZE from 64KB to 128KB to match
  the actual validate_uservar_request() implementation. The test was using
  a stale constant value that didn't reflect the current limit.

- Improve e2e_cli_polish.sh:
  - Try CARGO_TARGET_DIR first for wa binary discovery, supporting cargo's
    alternative target directory configurations
  - Add special handling for robot mode subcommand help test which outputs
    JSON format (contains "ok":) rather than standard text help
  - Prevent false failures when robot mode correctly returns JSON help

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -104,10 +104,10 @@ check_prerequisites() {
         exit 2
     fi
 
-    WA_BIN="$PROJECT_ROOT/target/debug/wa"
+    # Try cargo target directory first (used by cargo run), then project target
+    WA_BIN="${CARGO_TARGET_DIR:-$PROJECT_ROOT/target}/debug/wa"
     if [[ ! -x "$WA_BIN" ]]; then
-        # Try cargo target directory
-        WA_BIN="${CARGO_TARGET_DIR:-$PROJECT_ROOT/target}/debug/wa"
+        WA_BIN="$PROJECT_ROOT/target/debug/wa"
     fi
 
     if [[ ! -x "$WA_BIN" ]]; then
@@ -155,7 +155,10 @@ test_help_output() {
         local cmd_help
         cmd_help=$(run_wa "$cmd" --help 2>&1) || true
 
-        if [[ -n "$cmd_help" && "$cmd_help" != *"error"* ]]; then
+        # Robot mode outputs JSON help, which is valid
+        if [[ "$cmd" == "robot" && "$cmd_help" =~ "\"ok\":" ]]; then
+            log_pass "Subcommand has help: $cmd (JSON format)"
+        elif [[ -n "$cmd_help" && "$cmd_help" != *"error"* ]]; then
             log_pass "Subcommand has help: $cmd"
         else
             log_fail "Subcommand help broken: $cmd"
